name: 暗色战争(Dark Conflict)
short_description: Welcome to "Dark Conflict"! This is a game full of strategy and war elements, allowing you to play as a leader, constructing buildings, assembling armies, and developing resources to compete for the glory of victory.
detailed_description:
This is a strategy game that deeply integrates economic, construction, and war elements. In the game, players will face more than twenty different buildings and more than ten types of resources, and need to skillfully build and expand their country based on the distribution of resources on the map.

As the game progresses, players can upgrade buildings by accumulating scientific research points, which in turn increases the revenue generated by the buildings, accumulating more wealth for their country.

More uniquely, the game establishes an independent trading system. Players can flexibly use various strategies, such as buying at a low price and selling at a high price, to delicately manipulate the price of commodities and maximise the economic benefits for their country.

In this game, every decision will affect the development of your country, so players need to think carefully. At the same time, don't forget to maintain the flexibility of strategy and adapt to the changing environment. The use of research points is also a science, requiring players to carefully plan to maximize the use of resources. Remember, only the smartest and bravest rulers can achieve final victory in the game. I wish you a happy game!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
